files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for October Guide Lessons, each covering different subject areas: Theology and Testimony (Book of Mormon study), Work and Business (Teachers' Topics), Literature (biography study), and Social Service (child study/education). Each lesson has clear subject headings and distinct content boundaries. The file also includes various advertisements at the end which are part of the final lesson section.
